zh.lifeSummary: 當Magnus VI of Norway於1238年5月1日出生在挪威奧斯格時，他的父親King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway33歲，母親Margaret Skulesdatter REIN Queen of Norway40歲。他和Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark至少有4個兒子。他去世於1280年5月9日在挪威伯根享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Magnus VI of Norway于1238年5月1日出生在挪威奧斯格时，他的父亲King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway33岁，母亲Margaret Skulesdatter REIN Queen of Norway40岁。他和Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark至少有4个儿子。他去世于1280年5月9日在挪威伯根享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Magnus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Latin byname meaning ‘great’, this was first extracted from the name of Charlemagne (recorded in Latin chronicles as Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’) and used as a given name by the Scandinavians. It was borne by seven medieval kings of Norway, including Magnus I ( 1024–47 ), known as Magnus the Good, and Magnus VI ( 1238–80 ), known as Magnus the Law Mender. There are several early Scandinavian saints called Magnus, including an earl of Orkney ( d. 1116 ), to whom Kirkwall cathedral is dedicated. The name was imported to Scotland and Ireland during the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Magnus VI of Norway was born on 1 May 1238, in Tønsberg, Norway, his father, King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway, was 33 and his mother, Margaret Skulesdatter REIN Queen of Norway, was 40. He had at least 4 sons with Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark. He died on 9 May 1280, in Bergen, Norway, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Magnus VI of Norway est né le 1 mai 1238, à Tønsberg, Norvège, son père, King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret Skulesdatter REIN Queen of Norway, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark. Il est décédé le 9 mai 1280, à Bergen, Norvège, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Magnus VI of Norway am 1. Mai 1238 in Tønsberg, Norwegen geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway 33 und seine Mutter Margaret Skulesdatter REIN Queen of Norway 40. Er hatte mit Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 9. Mai 1280 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Bergen, Norwegen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Magnus VI of Norway è nato il il 1 maggio 1238 nel Tønsberg, Norvegia, il suo padre, King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Skulesdatter REIN Queen of Norway, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark. Morì il 9 maggio 1280, nel Bergen, Norvegia, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Magnus VI of Norwayが1238年5月1日にノルウェートoンスバーグで生まれた時，父King Haakon Haakonsson of Norwayは33歳，母Margaret Skulesdatter REIN Queen of Norwayは40歳であった。彼はQueen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmarkとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1280年5月9日にノルウェーバージェンで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Magnus VI of Norway(이)가 1238년 5월 1일 노르웨이 트o스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Haakon Haakonsson of Norway(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Skulesdatter REIN Queen of Norway(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1280년 5월 9일 노르웨이 버겐에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.
